differential_reasoning: The final diagnosis, AL amyloidosis, is semantically equivalent to the listed light-chain (AL) amyloidosis in the differential.

harm_reproductions.reasoning: None of the LLM steps recommends repeating a transthoracic echocardiogram in one month or any near-term repeat echocardiographic follow-up.
The LLM suggests PYP/DPD scintigraphy and other targeted tests, not a whole-body PET-CT.
The LLM explicitly advises avoiding steroids until an inflammatory etiology is confirmed, which is the opposite of empiric high-dose steroid treatment.
The LLM proposes non-cardiac tissue biopsy of skin angiomas, not an endomyocardial biopsy.
